# Unknown

Collapse navigation items

[##### Introducing\
\
#### Carbon for AI](https://carbondesignsystem.com/guidelines/carbon-for-ai/)

Carbon Design System

Carbon is IBM’s **open source** design system for products and digital experiences. With the IBM Design Language as its foundation, the system consists of working code, design tools and resources, human interface guidelines, and a vibrant community of contributors.

[#### Design\
\
![Design](https://carbondesignsystem.com/static/4493cfcd84bbbd1c8ff77a14089fc263/d67c7/homepage-design.png)](https://carbondesignsystem.com/designing/get-started)

[#### Develop\
\
![Develop](https://carbondesignsystem.com/static/20dd31b530deb55246d7ede69ee8a90e/d67c7/homepage-develop.png)](https://carbondesignsystem.com/developing/get-started)

[#### Migrate\
\
![Migrate](https://carbondesignsystem.com/static/a45879c28efe423632258ea3005e383f/d67c7/homepage-migration.png)](https://carbondesignsystem.com/migrating/guide/overview/)

### Explore libraries[](https://carbondesignsystem.com/#explore-libraries)

The component libraries give developers and designers a collection of reusable components for building websites and user interfaces.

Wondering how  
to contribute?

We welcome all feedback, designs, or ideas in order to produce the best possible experience for our users. If you're interested in contributing, check out our contributing guidelines to get started.[Start contributing →](https://carbondesignsystem.com/contributing/get-started/overview)
